about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am an experienced software architect and developer with a passion for creating elegant, efficient, and scalable solutions. My goal is to translate complex problems into clean, maintainable code that delivers real business value.
about.p2: With a keen eye for design details and deep technical expertise, I don't just build software—I craft experiences.
about.ai_text: I proactively automate, accelerate, and optimize processes using AI technologies to create innovative and future-proof software architectures.

projects.title: Public Projects
projects.subtitle: Projects I've created where the code is mostly public.

derplanner-ai.title: DerPlanner AI
derplanner-ai.subtitle: The Shareable Task Event Planner
derplanner-ai.description: An AI-powered planning application that simplifies organizing tasks and events. Users can add tasks in natural language, and the AI automatically structures, prioritizes, and schedules them. Planners are easily shareable via a link to facilitate collaboration.

1000-prototypes.title: 1000 Prototypes
1000-prototypes.subtitle: Run multiple AI agents in parallel
1000-prototypes.description: Run multiple AI agents in parallel to prototype websites, Image, Blogposts and more.

pdf-editor.title: PDF Editor
pdf-editor.subtitle: Super Simple PDF Editor
pdf-editor.description: A straightforward PDF editor for quickly annotating, drawing, and signing documents directly in the browser. No installation required, just upload and edit.

crm-board.title: CRM Canvas Board
crm-board.subtitle: A workflow visualization tool
crm-board.description: A simple and intuitive CRM board inspired by Canva to visualize and manage workflows. Allows for easy drag-and-drop management of contacts and processes.

more-on-github.title: More on GitHub
more-on-github.subtitle: Discover more projects and code samples

brands.title: Trusted by these Brands
brands.subtitle: Insights into my core responsibilities at leading companies.

lidl.name: Lidl
lidl.description: Managed and enhanced digital platforms with over 5 million monthly users. My focus was on scalability, performance, and implementing new customer-centric features.

vega.name: VEGA
vega.description: Designed and developed a complex, internal ERP warehouse system from scratch. The goal was to optimize logistics processes through a modern, tailor-made software solution.

stackit.name: StackIT / Schwarz Digits
stackit.description: Developed and architected cloud-native applications on the StackIT platform. I was responsible for designing robust and secure system landscapes for digital services.

drk.name: German Red Cross
drk.description: Provided technical leadership in the development of web platforms and internal applications. My task was to modernize the DRK's digital services and improve user-friendliness.

fun_facts.title: Fun Facts
fun_facts.subtitle: A few things you might not know about me.

facts.darkmode: Lives in Dark Mode. Real sunlight is often too bright.
facts.coffee: Reads code like others read the newspaper, but needs just as much coffee for it.
facts.ai_whisperer: Sometimes speaks to AI models more politely than to real people.
